# PrinterX

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="PrinterX icon">

2-2h16a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1.5&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M6 9V3a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h10a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v6&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div type="number" min="1" max="12" value="2"></label></div></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-output"><pre class="dioxus-icons-widget-code dxc dxc-system dxc-system-light-github-light class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">24</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">color</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-s">&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" class="dioxus-icons-widget-copy" data-di-copy="true" aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PrinterX;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PrinterX { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
fax, office, device, cross, cancel, remove, error

## Categories
devices

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/printer-x)
